projects.name: PulseBoard
projects.summary: Analytics builder with a clear power-user audience and a confirmed willingness to review a Bags-native launch plan immediately.

projects.name: SignalGarden
projects.summary: Research-heavy community product that could use Bags for contributor rewards and launch storytelling.

kits.oneLiner: A launch kit that turns PulseBoard's early power users into an aligned Bags-native growth ring.
kits.narrative: PulseBoard should not launch as a generic utility token. It should launch as an access-and-alignment layer for creators, operators, and early evangelists who make creator analytics feel like a living network. The token gives the builder a clean narrative, a fee-sharing surface, and a concrete reason to onboard the first contributors onchain.
kits.audience: Crypto-native creators, alpha communities, and community operators who care about discoverability, signal, and earned access.
hooks: Reward the first contributors who turn analytics into distribution.
Use fee sharing to make community growth provable instead of promised in DMs.
Give judges a visible path from launch plan to wallets, claims, and recurring usage.

feeRecipients.reason: Keeps the founder economically dominant while still sharing upside.
Rewards the person responsible for activating the first wave of users.
Leaves room for a moderator, designer, or referral partner.

bagsModules.label: Token launch scaffold
bagsModules.note: Name, symbol, and launch story are drafted for the builder.

bagsModules.label: Fee-sharing plan
bagsModules.note: Initial split is drafted and ready for builder approval.

bagsModules.label: Partner growth loop
bagsModules.note: Reserved for launch partners and repeatable referrals.

bagsModules.label: Launch room preview
bagsModules.note: Public-facing launch room can show token story and progress.

checklist.label: Pick the first growth operator slot

kits.studioNotes: This is the first confirmed builder. Keep turnaround tight and capture specific objections to language, splits, and launch timing.

kits.oneLiner: A contributor-driven Bags launch plan for a research collective that wants visible incentives from day one.
kits.narrative: SignalGarden's opportunity is to make research participation legible. The Bags angle is not speculation for its own sake. It is a visible incentive layer for analysts, community curators, and repeat contributors who help the research product compound.
kits.audience: Community researchers, Discord operators, and analysts who want a shared upside model.
hooks: Reward curation and recurring contributions publicly.
Make research distribution measurable with explicit incentive surfaces.
Create a launch room judges can understand in under one minute.

feeRecipients.reason: Preserves founder control in the early phase.
Allocates real upside for recurring analysts.
Keeps flexibility for moderators and partnerships.

bagsModules.label: Token launch scaffold
bagsModules.note: Narrative is drafted but builder outreach has not started.

bagsModules.label: Partner growth loop
bagsModules.note: Referral and partner roles are not assigned yet.

bagsModules.label: Launch room preview
bagsModules.note: Public page can be shown once builder opts in.

kits.studioNotes: Good second target after the confirmed builder flow is stable.
